title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: October 19, 2023
summary: October 19 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , at a whopping rate of 17.54% , from the level on 10/12/2023 of 5.647 M km 2 to 6.848 M km 2 for this week.
